name: Kitsuni Kitsunebi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>愉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>怪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>な<ruby lang="jp"><rb>燐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のきつねびゆらら
name_jp_rom: Yukai na Rin no Kitsunebi Yurara
name_jp_tl: Yurara, the Giddy and Curious Fox-o'-Wisps
desc: All face-up monsters on the field become FIRE. If your opponent has a FIRE monster on their field or in their GY, while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Kitsuni Kitsunebi" once per turn.
mnst_eff: All face-up monsters on the field become FIRE. If your opponent has a FIRE monster on their field or in their GY, while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Kitsuni Kitsunebi" once per turn.
eff: All face-up monsters on the field become FIRE. If your opponent has a FIRE monster on their field or in their GY, while this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Kitsuni Kitsunebi" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
